entities.name: CEREAL-COWPEA INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing cereal crops and cowpeas together in the same field to support smallholder farming systems

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country in the Soudano-Sahelian Zone where the on-farm evaluation was conducted

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total plant material produced, specifically valued for animal feed

entities.name: ANIMAL FEEDING
entities.description: The process of providing feed to livestock to overcome nutritional constraints

entities.name: FARMERS' LEARNING NETWORKS
entities.description: The participatory approach used to evaluate the performance of intercropping systems

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in intercropping systems with cowpea

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in intercropping systems with cereals

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used in intercropping systems with cowpea

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: WILIBALI
entities.description: A short maturing duration variety of cowpea

entities.name: SHORT MATURING DURATION
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity in a short period

entities.name: SANGARANKA
entities.description: A long maturing duration variety of cowpea

entities.name: LONG MATURING DURATION
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity in a long period

entities.name: ECONOMIC GAIN
entities.description: The financial profit obtained from the farming system, measured in XOF

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient food for household needs
